samples.xml_description:
<module id="accu">
    <description>Accumulates 4 input data and outputs the result.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data for addition.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating readiness for new data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating when 4 input data accumulation is reached.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[9:0]">10-bit output data representing the accumulated sum.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        // Sequential logic for accumulator operation
        reg [9:0] data_out_reg;
        reg [3:0] counter;
        reg valid_out_reg;
        
        // Combinational logic for accumulator operation
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                // Reset condition
                data_out_reg <= 10'd0;
                counter <= 4'd0;
                valid_out_reg <= 1'b0;
            end else if (valid_in == 1'b1 && counter < 4'd4) begin
                // Add incoming data to accumulator
                data_out_reg <= data_out_reg + {2'b00, data_in};
                counter <= counter + 1;
                valid_out_reg <= 1'b0;
            end else if (counter == 4'd4) begin
                // Reset counter after accumulating 4 inputs
                counter <= 4'd0;
                valid_out_reg <= 1'b1;
            end else begin
                // No valid output until 4 inputs have been accumulated
                valid_out_reg <= 1'b0;
            end
        end
        
        // Assigning output signals
        assign data_out = data_out_reg;
        assign valid_out = valid_out_reg;
    </implementation>
</module>
